fn_def_list.fn_code:
dwarf_expr_context::dwarf_expr_context ()
: stack (NULL),
  stack_len (0),
  stack_allocated (10),
  gdbarch (NULL),
  addr_size (0),
  ref_addr_size (0),
  offset (0),
  recursion_depth (0),
  max_recursion_depth (0x100),
  location (DWARF_VALUE_MEMORY),
  len (0),
  data (NULL),
  initialized (0),
  num_pieces (0),
  pieces (NULL)
{
  this->stack = XNEWVEC (struct dwarf_stack_value, this->stack_allocated);
}
